_publications._publicationTitle: Notch signaling via Hey1 and Id2b regulates Müller glia's regenerative response to retinal injury.

_contextSnippet: both Hey1 and Id2b suppressed MG proliferation without affecting cell death... Hey1 overexpression also suppressed injury-dependent induction of regeneration-associated genes like ascl1a and lin28a
details: Hey1 overexpression suppressed MG proliferation without affecting cell death and suppressed injury-dependent induction of regeneration-associated genes like ascl1a and lin28a
